Content:

Category

Description

General

Assignment Agreement

Reflecting the assignment of the BID to the new entity

Note : Template available on SpotDraft titled “XenPH: Assignment Agreement”

General

Business Documents

For changes of entity type, please refer to the onboarding documents for the specific requirements needed for each entity type.

SLA

  • Change of Legal Name and Entity Type - 5-7 WD Including the SLA of Legal and FP&A

  • MO Feedback - Same Working Day

  • FP&A: 1-2 WD

  • Legal: 2-3 WD

PROCESS STEP

CHANGING OF BUSINESS TYPE

(Changing of Business Type means changing the type of legal entity (i.e. from sole proprietorship to Corporation or vice versa)

No.

Process

Owner

1.

Merchants can request a change of business type after going live.


These requests can be routed through AM, Sales, or CS.

Merchant

2

AM, Sales, or CS will: request the necessary documents from the merchant.

AM/Sales/CS

3

Merchants submit the necessary documents to AM, Sales, or CS, who will then submit all required documents via Slack. AM, Sales, or CS will route the request through #mo-request channel.

Merchant & AM/ Sales/CS

4

MO to review request and documents submitted

Individual to Entity:

  • If the Document is complete and valid as an entity

  • If the authorized signatory in the individual account is a shareholder in the entity’s document

Entity to Individual:

  • Compliance Approval is needed

NOTE: If the authorized signatory in the individual account is not a shareholder in the entity’s document, the request would be declined and merchant needs to re-apply as a new merchant

MO

5

AM, Sales, or CS will raise request and approval via #legal-request.

  • AM/Sales/CS will provide legal with all information and context regarding the Assignment (what is the reason and/or underlying basis of the assignment)

  • AM/Sales/CS will use the Assignment Agreement Template on SpotDraft for Assignor and Assignee to review.

  • Legal will review the Agreement and amend terms, as necessary.

  • The Assignment Agreement will be signed by three parties: Assignor, Assignee, and Xendit.

Important Note: It is required that the effective date of the Assignment Agreement is the first day of the Month to ensure that appropriate billings/invoices are processed to the proper party. The standard for this should be that the Assignee shall be liable for service fees on the effective date of the Agreement.

AM/Sales/CS

6

Tag Finops team on the Slack request for clearance. This step can occur in parallel with other steps but is required and cannot be skipped.

MO

7

If the change is approved by Legal and Finops, the MO team will process the changes on the Admin Dashboard. MO will then upload all necessary documents to the Admin Dashboard and update the business type.

MO

TRANSFERRED TO DIFFERENT ENTITY

Transfer to a different entity usually involves merger and/or acquisition.

No.

Process

Owner

1.

Merchants can request transfer after going live.


These requests can be routed through their AM, Sales, or CS.

Merchant

2

AM, Sales, or CS, will request the necessary documents from the merchant.

Note: There should be an underlying agreement for this type of assignment (i.e. sale of assets, merger and/or acquisition documents, among others). This document should be requested from the merchant to prove the underlying basis for the assignment of account.

AM/Sales/CS

3

Merchants submit the necessary documents (underlying document mentioned above + same set with KYC documents) to AM, Sales, or CS, who will then submit all required documents via Slack. AM, Sales, or CS will route the request through #mo-request channel.

Merchant & AM/ Sales/CS

4

MO to review request and documents submitted

Individual

  • MO to Re-KYC details of merchant

Entity:

  • MO re-KYC all required docs under new entity

MO

5

AM, Sales, or CS will raise request via #legal-request. Merchant Assignor and Assignee must sign the Assignment Agreement as follow:

  • AM/Sales/CS will provide legal with all information and context regarding the Assignment (what is the reason and/or underlying basis of the assignment)

  • AM/Sales/CS will use the Assignment Agreement Template on SpotDraft for Assignor and Assignee to review.

    Reference Number to be used on the template:
    - Self-serve: Can be left blank or as indicated on the template
    - With Sales/AM: Sales and AM to provide

  • Legal will review the Agreement and amend terms, as necessary.

  • The Assignment Agreement will be signed by three parties: Assignor, Assignee, and Xendit.

Important Note: It is required that the effective date of the Assignment Agreement is the first day of the Month to ensure that appropriate billings/invoices are processed to the proper party. The standard for this should be that the Assignee shall be liable for service fees on the effective date of the Agreement.

AM/Sales/CS

6

Tag Finops on the Slack request for clearance. This step can occur in parallel with other steps but is required and cannot be skipped.

MO

7

If the change is approved (updated KYC documents have been completed, all SAs are completed and obtained approval from Finance), the MO team will process the changes on the Admin Dashboard. MO will then upload all necessary documents to the Admin Dashboard and update the business type.

MO

UPDATE LEGAL NAME OF SAME ENTITY

No.

Process

Owner

1.

Merchants can request a change of legal name after going live.


These requests can be routed through their AM, Sales, or CS.

Merchant

2

AM, Sales, or CS, will request the necessary documents from the merchant.

AM/Sales/CS

3

Merchants submit the necessary documents (same set with KYC documents) to AM, Sales, or CS, who will then submit all required documents via Slack. AM, Sales, or CS will route the request through #mo-request channel.

Merchant & AM/ Sales/CS

4

MO to review request and documents submitted

Individual

  • MO to Re-KYC if change of name match details of merchant

Entity:

  • MO re-KYC all required docs under new entity name

MO

5

AM, Sales, or CS will raise request via #legal-request. Merchant must sign and submit sets of documents as follow:

  • Merchant shall provide official documentation of their change of name.

  • AM/Sales/CS will use XenPH: General Addendum Template to revise the second party's official name.

AM/Sales/CS

6

If the change is approved (updated KYC documents have been completed, all SAs are completed), the MO team will process the changes on the Admin Dashboard. MO will then upload all necessary documents to the Admin Dashboard and update the business type.

MO
